‚óè‚Äã Graphs ‚óè‚Äã Searching ‚óè‚Äã Sorting ‚óè‚Äã Problem solving Why this matters This subject heavily affects: ‚óè‚Äã Software placements ‚óè‚Äã Coding interviews ‚óè‚Äã Product company jobs Database Management Systems (DBMS) Students learn: ‚óè‚Äã SQL ‚óè‚Äã Database design ‚óè‚Äã Data storage ‚óè‚Äã Query optimization Used in: ‚óè‚Äã Banking systems ‚óè‚Äã ERP systems ‚óè‚Äã Web applications Operating Systems Students learn: How systems like: ‚óè‚Äã Windows ‚óè‚Äã Linux ‚óè‚Äã Android work internally.
